local_validation.notes: The cast-binding proof executes Rule hOther = (Rule) hObj; from original container-Rule.bml and verifies hOther is bound in the method call environment after the instanceof guard passes.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A .bml method body can now execute a typed local cast binding such as Rule hOther = (Rule) hObj; as method-scoped environment state.
test_flows: python3 scripts/audit_bml_bmf_kernel_natives.py before commit to prove no new BML/BMF host-native semantics were introduced.

phase_gate.reason: Rule.operator== can now pass the first guard and bind hOther. Full thesis parity still requires member/property comparisons, final equality returns, loops, switch/select, exceptions, generic collections, and full BMF rule execution.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-rule-operator-cast-binding-proof.fk proves the original Rule.operator== cast binding against original container-Rule.bml.
